_meta.what: Blind stimulus for the structural-reveal pressure. No answer key here.

shape.target: CON (Relate x Structure) at the significance level — the structural reveal

seed_of_record.method: orthogonal collision of two random draws

conditions.marked: the SAME reveal bond carrying a salient surface cue (an emphasis adverb) — structure unchanged

_meta.note: Two casts are introduced in separate regions of the entity graph (a coin domain and a cartoonist domain). The measure emits per-line channels over prior context only; selection happens in a separate scorer against a held key this stimulus does not contain.

unmarked: Cecil Calvert founded the colony of Maryland.
The United States Mint honored Calvert in 1934.
Marjorie Organ drew cartoons for the New York Journal.
Robert Henri married Marjorie Organ in 1908.
John Sloan taught a night class in the city.
Calvert commissioned Organ to engrave the obverse.
